title: scutellaria javanica var. luzonica
intro: Scutellaria javanica var. luzonica is a plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae), commonly known as a type of skullcap or Javanese skullcap. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Scutellaria javanica var. luzonica include its potential to alleviate anxiety and insomnia, reduce fever, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
